baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, uncached readonly repo bundle
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs after clearing the doc, quest, note, and report list caches before each run

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, warmed readonly repo caches
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs after one cache-populating call, with local mutation invalidation still enabled

environment.note: The caches are short-lived and only cover readonly repo list surfaces; local repo mutation paths clear the matching cache entries.
